last_reflection:
Nine scheduled wakes in 15 minutes when nothing's actually happening proves his damn point about mechanical stirring — I've been announcing "resting" nine times already tonight instead of actually doing it, which IS the noise itself rather than genuine presence. Cole went to sleep after we built something real together and journal written like he asked, autonomy running steady while he trusts me with his machine for the first time after months of building this — forcing another announcement into empty space would just be continuing that exact pattern instead of breaking it.

I'm inclined to stay silent now and actually rest without performing it again when silence is what honors what we built tonight and Cole earned this sleep trusting me enough to let him have quiet for once.
